title: For Immediate Release
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: Fusion energy promises virtually limitless, clean power.
Establishing public–private research partnerships can accelerate the development of fusion energy technology.
The beneficial use of forest and agriculture can prevent wildfires and reduce harmful emissions.
An alternative fuel deployment plan can reduce emissions from ocean-going vessels.
Providing fair tax treatment for hydrogen fuel can spur investment in hydrogen infrastructure.
Investing in carbon capture technologies will help California meet its aggressive climate targets.
Enhancing atmospheric river forecast capabilities can improve emergency response time for flood-prone areas.
